title: elaeocarpus coumbouiensis
intro: Elaeocarpus coumbouiensis, also known as the 'Coumbouy tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, native to New Caledonia. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus coumbouiensis include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Elaeocarpus coumbouiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
